rationale: The 2015 paper is cited as part of broad background framing that manager cognition can bias marketing decisions and is also listed in a summary table of prior NPD/customer-orientation studies. The citing article does not develop its hypotheses from this specific paper, nor does it reuse its mechanism, design, measures, or findings in a distinct way. Most theorizing and tests are built from other mental-imagery and judgment-bias literature, so this citation functions mainly as contextual prior work rather than a direct building block.
